sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state: S=2056, N=0, 1 sky region, player at ~(38, 32)
# Test: ACTION7 -> collect targets -> ACTION7 -> collect targets -> ACTION7

# Phase 1: Use ACTION7
action(['ACTION7'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
colors = {}
for n in seg['nodes']:
    c = n['color']
    colors[c] = colors.get(c, 0) + n['pixels']
green_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"Phase 1 ACTION7: S={colors.get('S',0)}, N={colors.get('N',0)}, green={green_count}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Collect new targets
green_targets = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
if green_targets:
    targets = []
    for t in green_targets:
        b = t['boundary']
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
        targets.append((cr, cc))
    actions = [{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c} for r, c in targets]
    action(actions)
    
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    colors = {}
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        c = n['color']
        colors[c] = colors.get(c, 0) + n['pixels']
    green_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
    print(f"After collect: S={colors.get('S',0)}, N={colors.get('N',0)}, green={green_count}")
    print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
    
    # Phase 2: ACTION7
    action(['ACTION7'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    colors = {}
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        c = n['color']
        colors[c] = colors.get(c, 0) + n['pixels']
    green_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
    print(f"\nPhase 2 ACTION7: S={colors.get('S',0)}, N={colors.get('N',0)}, green={green_count}")
    print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
    
    # Collect again
    green_targets = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
    if green_targets:
        targets = []
        for t in green_targets:
            b = t['boundary']
            cr = sum(p[0] for p in b) // len(b)
            cc = sum(p[1] for p in b) // len(b)
            targets.append((cr, cc))
        actions = [{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c} for r, c in targets]
        action(actions)
        
        seg = current_frame.segmentation
        colors = {}
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            c = n['color']
            colors[c] = colors.get(c, 0) + n['pixels']
        green_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
        print(f"After collect 2: S={colors.get('S',0)}, N={colors.get('N',0)}, green={green_count}")
        print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
        
        # Phase 3: ACTION7
        action(['ACTION7'])
        seg = current_frame.segmentation
        colors = {}
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            c = n['color']
            colors[c] = colors.get(c, 0) + n['pixels']
        green_count = sum(1 for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N')
        print(f"\nPhase 3 ACTION7: S={colors.get('S',0)}, N={colors.get('N',0)}, green={green_count}")
        print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
